function.name: analyze_case
function.description: Analyze a medical case by ID and extract key clinical information including chief complaint, symptoms, diagnosis, urgency level, and required specialty.

caseId.description: Medical case ID - MUST be the exact 24-character hex string from the prompt, not a placeholder.

function.name: analyze_case_text
function.description: Analyze unstructured medical case text when NO case ID is available.

function.name: match_doctors_to_case
function.description: Match doctors to a medical case by case ID using GraphRAG when a 24-character case ID is in the prompt.

function.name: match_doctors_from_text
function.description: Match doctors from anonymized case text when NO existing case ID is available.

function.name: match_facilities_for_case
function.description: Match facilities for routing a medical case by case ID.

function.name: search_clinical_guidelines
function.description: Search clinical practice guidelines for a medical condition.

function.name: query_pubmed
function.description: Query PubMed for clinical literature and research articles.
